name: CodeError
description: CodeError schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Cloud Code Security API

policyId.description: Checkov policy ID that triggered the error (e.g., CKV_AWS_18).

policyName.description: Human-readable name of the violated policy.

category.description: Error category based on the type of scan that detected it.

resourceName.description: Name of the IaC resource where the error was detected.

filePath.description: Relative path to the file containing the error.

fileLineRange.description: Start and end line numbers of the affected code block.

repositoryId.description: Repository where the error was found.

branch.description: Branch where the error was detected.

guideline.description: URL to documentation explaining the policy and remediation steps.

firstDetected.description: Timestamp when the error was first detected.

lastDetected.description: Timestamp of the most recent scan where the error was found.
